parsedData.descripcion: As an AP user I want a configurable approval workflow.
parsedData.motivo: Given the client's need for a configurable approval workflow, additional development is required.

cambios.text: The system will show a new approval workflow setting.

integracion.text: The ERP should receive the approval status.

updateConsiderations.text: This change is updateable and should not be included in ERP Integration Conditions.

technicalConditions.text: Use a feature toggle for the approval workflow.
This internal subcondition should stay nested.
